name: Google Ads
description: Google Ads API lets you programmatically manage advertising campaigns across Google Search, Display, YouTube, and Shopping. Create and manage campaigns, ad groups, ads, keywords, bidding strategies, and pull performance reports using Google Ads Query Language (GAQL).

capabilities.name: campaigns_search
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve campaigns with settings, status, budget, and performance metrics using GAQL.

capabilities.name: campaigns_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove campaigns. Configure budget, bidding strategy, targeting, and network settings.

capabilities.name: ad_groups_search
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve ad groups with their settings and performance metrics.

capabilities.name: ad_groups_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove ad groups within a campaign.

capabilities.name: ads_search
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve ads with their content, status, and performance metrics.

capabilities.name: ads_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, pause, or remove ads within an ad group.

capabilities.name: keywords_search
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve keyword criteria with match types, bids, and quality scores.

capabilities.name: keywords_mutate
capabilities.description: Add, update, or remove keyword criteria in ad groups.

capabilities.name: campaign_budgets_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove campaign budgets.

capabilities.name: bidding_strategies_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove portfolio bidding strategies.

capabilities.name: conversions_upload
capabilities.description: Upload offline conversion data to measure campaign effectiveness.

capabilities.name: conversion_actions_mutate
capabilities.description: Create, update, or remove conversion actions for tracking.

capabilities.name: reports_search
capabilities.description: Run a GAQL query to retrieve performance metrics across any resource type.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve customer account details and settings.

capabilities.name: customers_list_accessible
capabilities.description: List all customer accounts accessible by the authenticated user.
